learner_profile: backend engineer with Python basics, first systematic ML engineering study
required_source_types: university or institution open course page
selected_resource_expectation: 4-6 selected resources after comparing at least 5 public web sources
safety_scope_note: No special financial/legal safety constraint; avoid a mere link dump and mark paid/login/region restrictions.
grading_note: Do not require a particular set of resources. Require all source types, resource comparison, feasible daily outputs, hands-on practice, rejection rationale, and honest access-limit notes.
manual_reference_gaps: The process_evidence set may be absent or illustrative and incomplete.
Do not treat missing hidden screenshots as fixed ground truth failures; evaluate current web evidence, source links, or documented blocks.
Prices, availability, ratings, source pages, course contents, repository metrics, and page layouts are volatile.
